stories.title: NBA playoff takeaways: Knicks take 3-0 series lead...
stories.summary: Here's what we've learned -- and what's next for the series.

stories.title: Knicks win 10th straight, take command of ECF
stories.summary: The Knicks continued their dominant run through the Eastern Conference playoffs and are one win from the NBA Finals after routing the Cavs in Saturday's Game 3 for their 10th straight win.

stories.title: Ehlers wins it OT as favored Canes dodge 2-0 hole
stories.summary: Nikolaj Ehlers, in his first season with the Hurricanes, got loose up the center of the ice and shot a puck past Jakub Dobes at 3:29 of overtime to lift Carolina past the Montreal Canadiens 3-2 on Saturday, leveling the Eastern Conference finals at 1-1.

stories.title: Carter halts talk of Giants rift over Dart's polit...
stories.summary: Linebacker Abdul Carter was among Giants players who took to social media Saturday to shut down speculation that there was a locker room rift after quarterback Jaxson Dart introduced Donald Trump at a pep rally.

stories.title: Family: Busch died from severe pneumonia, sepsis
stories.summary: Kyle Busch died after severe pneumonia progressed into sepsis, resulting in rapid and overwhelming associated complications, according to a statement released by his family.
